title: lanium microphyllum subsp. colombianum
intro: Lanium microphyllum subsp. colombianum, also known as Colombian lanium, is a subspecies of the Lanium microphyllum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Colombian lanium include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and protect against cell damage. Traditionally, Colombian lanium is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in herbal remedies and supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
